info.description: RentalCore is a rental management system API for managing jobs, customers, devices, products, and more.
info.title: RentalCore API

get.description: Returns the application currency symbol stored in app_settings.

put.description: Updates the application currency symbol. Must be non-empty and at most 8 characters.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of customers
Returns details of a specific customer by ID
Returns a paginated list of devices
Returns details of a specific device by ID or serial number
Returns a paginated list of financial transactions
Returns a paginated list of jobs

post.description: Creates a new job with the provided data

get.description: Returns details of a specific job by ID

put.description: Updates an existing job with the provided data

get.description: Returns the list of product quantity requirements for a job. These are the products requested for the job; specific devices are assigned later in warehousecore.
Returns a paginated list of products
Returns details of a specific product by ID
This endpoint has moved to WarehouseCore and always returns HTTP 410 Gone.

valid.description: Valid is true if Float64 is not NULL
Valid is true if String is not NULL
Valid is true if Time is not NULL
